channel.title: GroupShareKit on Romulus Crisan
channel.description: Recent content in GroupShareKit on Romulus Crisan

item.title: Introducing GroupShareKit
item.author: cromica@gmail.com (Romulus Crisan)
item.description: I love small and simple things that help me be more productive with my work. This is the main reasons why some time ago I started to work on GroupShareKit and I’m now happy to say that this is now available for everyone to use it as they like. Not only that you can use it but is completely open source.
